steps.title: Calculate the retail price
steps.content: The retail price is $260\%$ of the wholesale price of $5.00: $$2.60\times5.00=13.00$$ So the retail price is $13.00.

steps.title: Apply the 70% discount
steps.content: A $70\%$ discount means paying the remaining $30\%$ of the retail price: $$0.30\times13.00=3.90$$ The discounted price is 3.90 dollars.
